title: Digital Twin for Bioprocess Optimization
summary: Developing a detailed predictive computational model of cell culture and fermentation processes to optimize media and feeding strategies, with focus on high-throughput screening and multivariate data analysis.

title: C1-Gas Fermentation Engineering
summary: Engineering acetogenic and other C1-gas fermenting organisms for efficient conversion of synthesis gas (CO, CO₂, H₂) into valuable chemicals and sustainable biofuels.

title: Dehalococcoides Systems Analysis
summary: Genome-scale constraint-based metabolic modeling and transcriptome analysis to enhance bioremediation capabilities of chlorinated compound degradation.

title: MEG Production from Synthesis Gas
summary: Systems-level analysis of metabolic pathways and engineering strategies for microbial production of mono-ethylene glycol, an important platform chemical.

title: Sustainable Biopolymer Production
summary: Synthetic biology approaches for developing environmentally friendly biodegradable polymers using engineered microbial systems.
